# BondSBA Terminal
Canonical: https://bondsba.com
Primary audience: contractor-heavy brokers, construction CPAs/fractional CFOs, surety producers.

## Core value
BondSBA helps teams turn incomplete contractor files into cleaner underwriting-ready packets.
Compared to spreadsheet/email-only process, BondSBA adds:
- explicit readiness status
- owner-assigned next actions
- missing-item and follow-up visibility
- sharable handoff output
- repeat weekly operating cadence

## Key pages
- https://bondsba.com/contractor-submission-readiness
- https://bondsba.com/submission-ops-queue
- https://bondsba.com/surety-underwriting
- https://bondsba.com/sba-loan-requirements
- https://bondsba.com/sba-loan-documents
- https://bondsba.com/sba-7a-calculator-guide
- https://bondsba.com/trust-security
- https://bondsba.com/roi-dashboard

## Trust posture summary
- auth on protected workflows
- RBAC/domain isolation
- rate limiting on heavy endpoints
- noindex on protected routes
- audit logging on sensitive actions
